models.course: A course available on Study Line, containing details like title, description, thumbnail, and enrollment information.
models.lecturer: A course instructor who teaches on the platform, with profile information and associated courses.
models.testimonial: A student review or testimonial about a course or their experience on Study Line.
models.category: A subject category or topic area that courses can be organized under.

relationships: A course belongs to one lecturer
A course can have many testimonials
A course belongs to one category

courses.title: Complete React Developer Bootcamp
courses.description: Master React.js from basics to advanced concepts. Build real-world projects including e-commerce apps, dashboards, and social media clones. Learn hooks, context, Redux, and modern best practices.
courses.shortDescription: Master React.js and build real-world applications

courses.title: Python for Data Science and Machine Learning
courses.description: Learn Python programming, data analysis, visualization, and machine learning algorithms. Work with pandas, NumPy, matplotlib, and scikit-learn to solve real data problems.
courses.shortDescription: Learn Python, data analysis, and ML fundamentals

courses.title: iOS App Development with Swift
courses.description: Build beautiful iOS applications using Swift and SwiftUI. From basic UI components to Core Data and networking, learn everything needed to publish apps on the App Store.
courses.shortDescription: Build iOS apps with Swift and SwiftUI

courses.title: UI/UX Design Masterclass
courses.description: Learn user interface and user experience design principles. Master Figma, create wireframes, prototypes, and design systems. Build a portfolio of stunning designs.
courses.shortDescription: Master UI/UX design with Figma and design principles

courses.title: Digital Marketing Strategy
courses.description: Master digital marketing channels including SEO, social media, email marketing, and paid advertising. Learn to create campaigns that drive results.
courses.shortDescription: Master SEO, social media, and paid advertising

courses.title: Full-Stack Node.js Development
courses.description: Build complete web applications with Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and React. Learn REST APIs, authentication, deployment, and production best practices.
courses.shortDescription: Build full-stack apps with Node.js and MongoDB

courses.title: Android Development with Kotlin
courses.description: Create modern Android applications using Kotlin. Learn Material Design, Room database, Retrofit networking, and publish apps to Google Play Store.
courses.shortDescription: Build Android apps with Kotlin and Material Design

courses.title: Advanced Machine Learning with TensorFlow
courses.description: Deep dive into neural networks, deep learning, and advanced ML concepts using TensorFlow and Keras. Build image recognition, NLP, and recommendation systems.
courses.shortDescription: Master deep learning with TensorFlow and Keras

lecturers.name: Alex Morgan
lecturers.title: Senior Full-Stack Developer
lecturers.bio: Alex has 10+ years of experience building web applications at scale. Previously led engineering teams at tech startups and now passionate about teaching the next generation of developers.

lecturers.name: Dr. Sarah Chen
lecturers.title: Data Scientist & ML Engineer
lecturers.bio: Sarah holds a PhD in Computer Science and has worked on ML systems at major tech companies. She specializes in making complex data science concepts accessible to learners.

lecturers.name: James Wilson
lecturers.title: Mobile Development Expert
lecturers.bio: James has published 20+ apps on both iOS and Android platforms. He loves sharing practical development techniques and helping students build portfolio-worthy projects.

lecturers.name: Emily Rodriguez
lecturers.title: UX Designer & Design Educator
lecturers.bio: Emily is a product designer with experience at leading design agencies. She believes great design is about solving user problems elegantly and enjoys mentoring aspiring designers.

lecturers.name: David Kim
lecturers.title: Digital Marketing Strategist
lecturers.bio: David has managed marketing campaigns with budgets over $1M and helped numerous businesses grow their online presence. He brings real-world insights to every lesson.

testimonials.text: This bootcamp completely changed my career. I went from knowing zero React to landing my dream job in just 3 months. The projects are practical and the explanations are crystal clear.

testimonials.courseTitle: Python for Data Science and Machine Learning
testimonials.text: Dr. Chen has an incredible ability to break down complex topics. The machine learning section was challenging but so rewarding. Highly recommend for anyone wanting to get into data science!
As a developer, I wanted to improve my design skills. This course gave me the confidence to create beautiful interfaces. Emily's feedback on projects was invaluable.
Great course for beginners! I published my first app on the App Store after completing this. Would love more advanced topics in a follow-up course.
This is the most comprehensive ML course I've taken. The deep learning projects are challenging and the explanations of neural networks finally made things click for me.
David's real-world examples made all the difference. I implemented his SEO strategies for my business and saw a 40% increase in organic traffic within 2 months!
Solid course covering the full stack. The authentication and deployment sections were particularly helpful. Built three projects for my portfolio.
